response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor and software craftsman, but lacks the executive leadership, organizational scaling, and team management experience required for a CTO role. While he has some recent exposure to AI tooling, there is no evidence of architecting complex, production-grade multi-agent systems for fintech applications.
strengths: Over 20 years of hands-on software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks and platforms.
Proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems and microservices, handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience and has no track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people.
Missing required experience architecting stateful, multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes commercial or financial environments.
No demonstrated experience managing outsourced engineering teams or structuring organizational governance frameworks.
